input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.9.2
            TITLE: low voltage (glv) system

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.2: Low Voltage (GLV) System
EV.9.2 Low Voltage (GLV) System 
The Shutdown Circuit may be Closed when or after the GLV System is energized  EV.7.2.4

final_answer: rule EV.9.2: Low Voltage (GLV) System EV.9.2 Low Voltage (GLV) System The Shutdown Circuit may be Closed when or after the GLV System is energized EV.7.2.4
